caption: In a domestic kitchen setting, five people are gathered around a white circular table during a meal. A bald man in a white button-down shirt sits in the foreground on the left, while a blonde woman in a white tank top and a teenage boy in a grey t-shirt sit next to him. Across the table, a woman in a blue shirt interacts with the group, and another person is partially visible on the far right. The table is set with plates of food and glasses of orange juice. In the first frame, the woman in blue looks toward the others. In the second frame, she raises her right arm and points toward the boy. By the third and fourth frames, she lowers her arm and gestures with her hand while continuing to speak to the group. The background features kitchen cabinetry and a red framed picture on the wall.
